title: postgresql:16 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
pgaudit
[16.0-1]
- Update to 16.0
- Support postgresql 16
- Initial import for PG 16 module
- Resolves: RHEL-3635

pg_repack
[1.5.1-1]
- Update to v1.5.1

[1.4.8-2]
- Add new build dependencies to fix build with lz4 enabled
- Related: RHEL-47604

[1.4.8-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-3636
- Initial import for PG 16 module

pgvector
[0.6.2-2]
- Enable Portable build
- Resolves: RHEL-84405

[0.6.2-1]
- Initial packaging

postgis
[3.5.3-3]
- Rebuild (gdal)

[3.5.3-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_43_Mass_Rebuild

[3.5.3-1]
- Update to 3.5.3

[3.5.2-2]
- Rebuild (SFCGAL)

[3.5.2-1]
- Update to 3.5.2

[3.5.1-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_42_Mass_Rebuild

[3.5.1-1]
- Update to 3.5.1

[3.5.0-3]
- Rebuild (GDAL)

[3.5.0-2]
- Rebuild (gdal)

[3.5.0-1]
- Update to 3.5.0

postgres-decoderbufs
[2.4.0-1.Final]
- Initial import for postgresql 16 stream
- Related: RHEL-3635

postgresql
* Wed Sep 03 2025 Filip Janus <fjanus@redhat.com> - 16.10-1
- Update to 16.10

[16.8-1]
- Update to 16.8
- Fix CVE-2025-1094

[16.6-1]
- Update to 16.6
- Fixes: CVE-2024-10976 CVE-2024-10978 CVE-2024-10979

[16.4-2]
- Fix build on 16.4

[16.4-1]
- Update to 16.4

[16.1-3]
- Remove /var/run/postgresql
- Related: RHEL-51275

[16.1-2]
- Enable lz4 and zstd support

[16.1-1]
- Update to 16.1
- Update upgrade server to 15.5
- Resolves: RHEL-3636

[16.0-1]
- New postgresql stream - 16
- Remove pdf documentation
- Update postgresql-setup to 8.9
- postmaster binary no more shipped
- Resolves: RHEL-3636

pgaudit
[16.0-1]
- Update to 16.0
- Support postgresql 16
- Initial import for PG 16 module
- Resolves: RHEL-3635

pg_repack
[1.5.1-1]
- Update to v1.5.1

[1.4.8-2]
- Add new build dependencies to fix build with lz4 enabled
- Related: RHEL-47604

[1.4.8-1]
- Resolves: RHEL-3636
- Initial import for PG 16 module

pgvector
[0.6.2-2]
- Enable Portable build
- Resolves: RHEL-84405

[0.6.2-1]
- Initial packaging

postgis
[3.5.3-3]
- Rebuild (gdal)

[3.5.3-2]

postgres-decoderbufs
[2.4.0-1.Final]
- Initial import for postgresql 16 stream
- Related: RHEL-3635

postgresql
* Wed Sep 03 2025 Filip Janus <fjanus@redhat.com> - 16.10-1
- Update to 16.10

[16.8-1]
- Update to 16.8
- Fix CVE-2025-1094

[16.6-1]
- Update to 16.6
- Fixes: CVE-2024-10976 CVE-2024-10978 CVE-2024-10979

[16.4-2]
- Fix build on 16.4

[16.4-1]
- Update to 16.4

[16.1-3]
- Remove /var/run/postgresql
- Related: RHEL-51275

[16.1-2]
- Enable lz4 and zstd support

[16.1-1]
- Update to 16.1
- Update upgrade server to 15.5
- Resolves: RHEL-3636

[16.0-1]
- New postgresql stream - 16
- Remove pdf documentation
- Update postgresql-setup to 8.9
- postmaster binary no more shipped
- Resolves: RHEL-3636
